title: Informationsabend Geburt
heading: Informationsabend Geburt

sections.contentSummary: Full-width banner image with event title overlay

sections.heading: Informationsabend Geburt
sections.contentSummary: Two-column layout: main content (left 2/3) with rich text description plus transport/map info; sidebar (right 1/3) with event date/time/location instances and registration CTA

sections.heading: Machen Sie sich mit dem Team und den Räumlichkeiten vertraut
sections.contentSummary: Rich text body: introduction paragraph, Ort/Dauer section, Wichtige Hinweise section (free event, registration required, no symptoms)

sections.heading: Anfahrt
sections.contentSummary: Directions by car (paid parking in underground garage) and public transport (Bus Nr. 8 from Biel-Bienne station to Klinik Linde, every 15 min)
Embedded Google Maps iframe showing Klinik Linde, Blumenrain 105, 2503 Biel (blocked by cookie consent by default)
Aside with multiple upcoming event date instances, each showing date (icon-calendar), time (icon-clock) and venue (icon-location), separated by horizontal rules. Followed by registration button.

sections.heading: Haben Sie Fragen zum Informationsabend?
sections.contentSummary: Contact prompt pointing to midwives team via email kurswesen.linde@hirslanden.ch

templateSpecificComponents.description: Repeating event date block in sidebar. Each occurrence shows: event title (e.g. 'Informationsabend Geburt 25.6.'), date (25.06.2026), time (18:30 - 19:30 Uhr), venue (Klinik Linde). Multiple occurrences stacked with <hr> separators.
iframe embed of Google Maps for clinic address: Klinik Linde, Blumenrain 105, 2503 Biel. Blocked by cookie consent wall with fallback link to open directly on Google Maps.
Footer contact block showing clinic name and address: Hirslanden KLINIK LINDE, Blumenrain 105, 2503 Biel
Footer social media icon links: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, Blog
Prominent 'Anmelden' (Register) CTA button in sidebar linking to external event registration system at event.hirslanden.ch
Minimal header navigation with two items: Programm (active, links to program page) and Anmeldung (links to registration page). Includes hamburger menu for mobile.

layoutNotes: This page is served from a standalone event management system (eyeframe/eyevip) separate from the main Hirslanden CMS — not the standard AEM EDS page template. The URL resolves to a dedicated event microsite. The local dev server (localhost:3000) returns 404 for this path because the content has not been migrated to AEM EDS yet; data was fetched directly from the live origin (www.hirslanden.ch). Layout is a two-column design: 1/3 sidebar (right) with event date list and registration button, 2/3 main column (left) with rich text description, transport info, and embedded map. The event is a recurring series (Veranstaltungsserie) with 6 upcoming occurrences all at the same venue. Cookie consent banner blocks Google Maps iframe by default. Page language is German (de).
